title: Sonic Dna
definition: The idea that AUM encodes the structure of existence, similar to DNA's role in biology.

difficulty_levels.beginner: AUM is seen as a code for life, like how DNA carries genetic information. This suggests that chanting AUM can help understand and navigate the fundamental laws of the universe.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: AUM is likened to DNA in that it encodes a pattern which, when activated, orchestrates the entire drama of consciousness—its birth, its life, its decay, and release. This view implies AUM as a sonic blueprint of existence itself.
difficulty_levels.expert: The analogy between AUM and DNA suggests that AUM is a holographic representation of the universe's laws. Each sound (Ah, Mmm, N) represents a specific aspect of existence (birth, becoming, dissolution), while the continuous resonant flow symbolizes the unified, holistic experience of existence itself.

extra_fields.insight: The realization that AUM is not just a prayer or mantra, but a sonic DNA of consciousness encapsulating the structure of the universe in its vibrations.
